modeling_constraints: Do not hard-code validation stimulus, stop times, sample windows, gold internals, or simulator side channels.

properties.observable_contract: After each publication clock, rising `ready` crossings collect up to `nbit` serial decisions MSB first.
For each collected decision, high `dp` adds the full current binary weight and low `dp` with high `dn` adds half of that weight.
The decoded value is normalized by the public bit depth and shifted by the required midscale offset before driving `dout`.
`dout` updates from event-driven ready/publication handling and holds between publication events.

title: Cyclic Decoder 10b
